scope: Repeatable local and sanctioned-VM launch-surface audit before the bounded sanctioned paper session.

remaining_ready_matches.classification: Windows OS feature task, not project launch surface

local_windows_task_scheduler.material_change: Project and legacy local scheduled tasks must remain disabled; the sanctioned execution path is the VM only.

local_process_audit.note: broker-capable launch patterns only; inspection commands excluded

evidence: The unattributed-order incident is cleared for arming only when the broker is flat, local launch surfaces are fenced, the VM is idle, and the no-new-order watch is clean.
If a new broker order appears without explicit operator launch, do not arm the window.
unattributed_order_source.governance_treatment: Keep this as a pre-arm review gate until repeated clean checks show no autonomous order source remains.

hard_rules_preserved: No exclusive execution window was armed.
No strategy selection or risk policy was changed.
No raw session exhaust or raw trade log was committed.
next_safe_operator_gate: Immediately before any exclusive-window arm, re-run broker flat/open-order check.
Re-run local scheduled task and process launch-surface checks.
Run a short no-new-order watch; if a new broker order appears without an explicit operator launch, stop and investigate instead of arming.
